description_long: This bungalow features a sprawling layout with a combination of modern and traditional architectural elements, including a prominent two-story section and several single-story wings. The structure is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a driveway, and fenced green lawns, with a visible swimming pool and outdoor seating area. The roof is primarily gabled with red and gray tiling, and the exterior walls are finished in a mix of light and dark tones, likely stucco and wood paneling. Large windows and glass doors are distributed asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and views of the surrounding grounds. The property includes a garage, a covered porch, and multiple entry points, enhancing accessibility and functionality. Decorative shrubs, trees, and paved walkways further accentuate the residential and inviting character of the bungalow.
description: A large, modern-traditional bungalow with gabled roofs, landscaped gardens, and a mix of single and two-story sections, featuring large windows, a garage, and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: From this angle, the bungalow's expansive layout, red-tiled roofs, and fenced green lawns are prominent, with the garage and main entry visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the two-story section, landscaped front yard, and the main entrance, with the driveway and porch clearly visible.
description_view_2: The rear of the bungalow is shown, featuring a swimming pool, outdoor seating, and a mix of roof types, with the garden and trees in the background.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the fenced backyard, visible horse, and play area, along with the side of the bungalow and its outbuildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and scattered large windows
